title: neoancistrophyllum robustum
intro: Neoancistrophyllum robustum, also known as the giant club fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Neoancistrophyllum robustum are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves in water, and it is often used in teas and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
